channel.title: Download free software, update daily!
channel.description: Taiwebs.com - Download free software applications, full version, latest updates!

item.title: Download SD Maid 2/SE - System Cleaner 1.6.2-rc1
item.description: SD Maid 2/SE - System Cleaner is a reliable helper for your Android, keeping the device clean & orderly. SD Maid SE has optional features that use the AccessibilityService API to automate tedious actions. Using the AccessibilityService API, SD Maid SE can click buttons for you to perform cross-app operations, for example, clear cache. SD Maid SE does not use the AccessibilityService API to collect information. No one is perfect and neither is Android Apps you deleted will leave...

Nova brings advanced features to enhance your home screen but remains a great, user-friendly choice for everyone. Whether you want to completely overhaul your home screen or are looking for a cleaner, faster home screen launcher, Nova is the answer. item.title: Download Knots 3D 10.8.2
item.description: Knots 3D is a mobile application that provides visual and interactive instructions for tying different types of knots. This app can be used to learn and practice different knots, with detailed animations and illustrations showing the correct technique for each knot. Used by arborists, fishermen, firefighters, climbers, military, and boy and girl scouts worldwide, Knots 3D will quickly teach you how to tie even the most difficult knots! With more than 175 nautical miles, Knots 3D will be...

item.title: Download Avast Cleanup – Phone Cleaner 26.03.0 build 800011385
item.description: Avast Cleanup - Phone Cleaner is a mobile app for Android devices designed to help users optimize their phone's performance and free up storage space. This application provides many tools and features to clean and speed up your phone. One of the main features of Avast Cleanup is the Junk Cleaner, which scans your phone for unnecessary files such as temporary files, app cache, and other junk data. The app will then provide a list of files that can be safely deleted to free up space on...

Widget can display events from facebook, google or company calendar. Can also set custom reminders for events from the calendar - so you'll never miss a thing again!

Plus, it's got an outstanding design that makes getting your weather information easy and fun. Track current conditions and forecasts for your location and up to 12 locations of your choice. item.title: Download Anti Spy Detector: Anti Hack 49.24.2.26
item.description: With the powerful built-in firewall in this app, you can monitor every outgoing connection each app makes. If you don't trust the app, you can block it from accessing the internet with a firewall to prevent tracking and analysis. Every outgoing IP or domain will be saved and you can see them, the Firewall will show you the address, organization and information about that IP and if you feel suspicious you can block that domain so that application is no longer accessible. Additionally, you...

item.title: Download WiFi Analyzer Pro 7.0
item.description: WiFi Analyzer Pro is a mobile application that provides users with advanced tools to analyze and optimize their Wi-Fi network. It allows users to monitor Wi-Fi signal strength and quality, view graphical charts of their network's channel usage, and select the optimal channel for their network to minimize interference from other neighboring networks. In addition, WiFi Analyze Pro can help users diagnose connection issues, such as slow speeds or lost connections, by displaying signal...
